description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' and 'PREMIUM COCKTAIL JUICE' with a capacity of 1 liter. The front of the carton features vibrant images of assorted fruits including pineapple, apple, banana, orange, and blueberries, suggesting a mixed fruit cocktail flavor. The packaging is predominantly white with gold accents and a gold-colored top, and it has a white plastic screw cap for pouring. One side of the carton displays detailed nutritional information and ingredients in multiple languages. The carton is made of laminated paperboard, likely with an inner foil or plastic lining to preserve freshness, and is lightweight and portable. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for display in urban retail environments or for on-the-go consumption.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton with a screw cap, featuring images of assorted fruits and detailed labeling. The packaging is modern, with clear branding and nutritional information.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'FARAGELLO' branding vertically, the gold top, and part of the nutritional information panel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label, fruit illustrations, and product details prominently.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the 'FARAGELLO' branding and gold top, but less visible nutritional information.
description_view_3: Back view dominated by the nutritional information panel and multilingual text, with the brand and product name at the top.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: pineapple, apple, banana, orange, and blueberries
